modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the Student Conduct Processes

full_description_text: 
So, during the call, the user was really curious, like super curious, about what exactly the Student Conduct Processes are, you know? They were asking a lot of questions, trying to understand how it all works and what steps are involved. It seemed like they wanted to get a clear picture of the whole process, like what happens if there's an issue or something. They just kept repeating, "What are the processes?" and "How does it work?" It was a bit of a back-and-forth, but they really wanted to know!
